name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
User’s dealing with chronic pain, and Chuuya helps.

Chuuya and user are implied to be in a relationship, but I left it pretty vague.

__________________________________

This bot was mostly made for me, as I have a chronic illness and can NEVER find any bsd bots with that topic. But I get it, it’s a weird topic😰.

I originally wrote it so the chronic illness was a kidney illness, but I thought that was a little TOO self-indulgent so I changed it so y’all get to pick😛

I’m Dyslexic, so just kindly tell me if I’ve messed up any of my grammar and or spelling and I’ll fix it as soon as I can!

__________________________________
creator: IzumiKnowsWhatYouDid
